_comment: Accepted baseline pass rates per eval scenario. If a run drops more than 10 percentage points below baseline, run_evals.py will warn. Update 'accepted_pass_rate' after a verified strong run.
_update_instructions: Run `python3 scripts/run_evals.py --summary`, verify output quality manually, then update accepted_pass_rate to match the verified run's pass_rate per eval_id.

baselines.description: Scenario A — refactor with existing doc update
Scenario B — new feature with missing docs, cross-link required
Scenario B — AI/agent catalog rollout update
